name: discord-plugin
description: Discord integration plugin for AGNT - Send messages (with automatic message chunking for content over Discord's 2000-char limit), manage roles, receive messages, and interact with Discord servers
author: AGNT

schema.title: Discord API
schema.description: Interact with Discord to perform various operations such as sending messages, managing roles, and uploading files. Long messages are automatically split into multiple chunks (Discord caps a single message at 2000 characters); splitting is code-block aware and emoji-safe.

action.description: The action to perform on Discord

channelId.description: The ID of the Discord channel (for SEND_MESSAGE and UPLOAD_FILE actions)

message.description: The message to send (for SEND_MESSAGE action). Messages longer than the Discord limit are automatically sent as multiple sequential messages unless autoSplit is disabled.

autoSplit.description: Automatically split messages that exceed the character limit into multiple sequential messages (for SEND_MESSAGE action). Splitting avoids breaking words, preserves fenced code blocks, and never slices emoji. Default: true. Set false to send as-is (Discord will reject content over 2000 chars).

splitLimit.description: Maximum characters per message chunk when autoSplit is on (for SEND_MESSAGE action). Capped at Discord's 2000-char hard limit. Lower it for a safety margin. Default: 2000.

splitDelayMs.description: Delay in milliseconds between sequential chunks when a message is split (for SEND_MESSAGE action). Keeps chunks in order and avoids Discord rate limits. Default: 350. Set 0 for no delay.

numberChunks.description: Append a (n/N) counter to the end of each chunk when a message is split (for SEND_MESSAGE action). Default: false.

guildId.description: The ID of the Discord guild (server) (for ASSIGN_ROLE and GET_MEMBERS actions)

roleId.description: The ID of the role to assign (for ASSIGN_ROLE action)

memberIds.description: Comma-separated list of member IDs to assign the role to (for ASSIGN_ROLE action)

filePath.description: Absolute path to a file on disk to upload (preferred — avoids base64 bloat and ensures proper video/image previews). Either filePath OR fileData is required.

fileName.description: The name of the file as it should appear in Discord (for UPLOAD_FILE action). Optional when using filePath — defaults to the basename of filePath. Required when using fileData.

fileData.description: Base64-encoded file data (for UPLOAD_FILE action). Prefer filePath when possible — base64 uploads are slower and heavier. Either filePath OR fileData is required.

description.description: Optional alt text / description for the attachment (accessibility). For UPLOAD_FILE action.

spoiler.description: If true, mark the uploaded file as a spoiler (blurred until clicked). For UPLOAD_FILE action.

includeAvatarMeta.description: When true, include the raw Discord avatar hash and a resolved CDN URL for each member (for GET_MEMBERS action)

includeGlobalProfile.description: When true, include discriminator, global name, banner hash, and other global profile metadata (for GET_MEMBERS action)

trackRoles.description: Optional list of role IDs to flag members with an isTracked indicator (comma-separated for GET_MEMBERS action)

hashFields.description: Optional list of member field names to hash (comma-separated) for audit comparisons (for GET_MEMBERS action)

targetUserId.description: The ID of the user to ban (for BAN_MEMBER action)

banReason.description: Optional audit log reason for the ban (for BAN_MEMBER action)

deleteMessageDays.description: Number of days of messages to delete (0-7) when banning the user (for BAN_MEMBER action)

success.description: Indicates whether the Discord operation was successful

result.description: The result of the Discord operation. For SEND_MESSAGE: a single-message object, or when a long message was split, a chunked object with { chunked: true, chunkCount, messages: [...] } plus top-level pointers to the first message.

error.description: Error message if the Discord operation failed

schema.title: Receive Discord Message
schema.description: Listen for incoming Discord messages in a specified channel and trigger the workflow when a new message is received.

channelId.description: The ID of the Discord channel to monitor

author.description: The username of the message author

username.description: The display username of the author

avatarUrl.description: The avatar URL of the message author

authorId.description: The ID of the message author

channelId.description: The ID of the channel where the message was sent

guildId.description: The ID of the Discord server (guild)

timestamp.description: The timestamp of when the message was created

attachments.description: Array of file attachments on the message
